mapper.select:
SELECT TCCT.CONT_NUM , TCCT.CONT_CNT , TCCT.BUYER_CD ,GETCUSTNAME(TCCT.GATE_CD, TCCT.BUYER_CD) AS BUYER_NM , TCCT.CONT_USER_ID ,GETUSERNAME(TCCT.GATE_CD, TCCT.CONT_USER_ID, #{ses.langCd}) AS CONT_USER_NM ,GETUSERNAME(TCCT.GATE_CD, TCCT.CONT_USER_ID, #{ses.langCd}) AS DEC_CONT_USER_NM -- 메일방송용 ,USERC.TEL_NUM AS DEC_CONT_TEL_NUM -- 메일발송용 , TCCT.DEPT_CD ,GETDEPTNAME(TCCT.GATE_CD, TCCT.BUYER_CD, TCCT.DEPT_CD, #{ses.langCd}) AS DEPT_NM ,(TCCT.SIGN_DATE, 'yyyyMMdd') AS SEND_DATE , TCCT.SEND_YN , TCCT.CONT_DESC , TCCT.PROGRESS_CD , TCCT.USER_ID AS USER_ID
, TCCT.USER_NMAS USER_NM ,USERD.EMAIL AS EMAIL ,USERD.TEL_NUM AS TEL_NUM , REGEXP_REPLACE(REGEXP_REPLACE(USERD.CELL_NUM ,'[^0-9]',''),'(.{3})(.+)(.{4})','\1-\2-\3') AS CELL_NUM , USERD.SITE_USER_ID ,GETUSERNAME(USERD.GATE_CD, USERD.SITE_USER_ID, #{ses.langCd}) AS SITE_USER_NM ,GETCODENAME(USERD.GATE_CD, 'M151', USERD.GENDER, #{ses.langCd}) AS GENDER ,USERC.ZIP_CD AS ZIP_CD ,USERD.ADDR_1 AS ADDR_1 ,USERD.ADDR_2 AS ADDR_2 ,USERD.BIRTH_DATE AS BIRTH_DATE , TCCT.G_PLACE , TCCT.JIKMU_NAME ,(TCCT.CONT_DATE, 'yyyyMMdd') AS CONT_DATE ,(TCCT.CONT_START_DATE, 'yyyyMMdd') AS CONT_START_DATE ,(TCCT.CONT_END_DATE, 'yyyyMMdd') AS CONT_END_DATE , TCCT.BASE_PAY , TCCT.BASE_PAY_RMKS , TCCT.FOOD_PAY , TCCT.FOOD_PAY_RMKS , TCCT.JOB_PAY , TCCT.JOB_PAY_RMKS , TCCT.EXTEND_PAY , TCCT.EXTEND_PAY_RMKS , TCCT.WORK_PAY , TCCT.WORK_PAY_RMKS , TCCT.NIGHT_PAY , TCCT.NIGHT_PAY_RMKS , TCCT.WORKER_PAY_AMT , TCCT.ATT_FILE_NUM , TCCT.CONT_TYPE ,getFileCount(TCCT.GATE_CD, TCCT.ATT_FILE_NUM) AS ATT_FILE_CNT ,((TCCT.SIGN_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI'),' ') AS SIGN_DATE , TCCT.CONT_CLOSE_RMK , USERD.DEL_FLAG AS USER_DEL_FLAG , TCCT.SIGN_STATUS , TCCT.ATT_FILE_NUM AS PDF_ATT_FILE_NUM ,getFileCount(TCCT.GATE_CD, TCCT.ATT_FILE_NUM) AS PDF_ATT_FILE_CNT , TCCT.BUNDLE_NUM , TCCT.K_ADDR , TCCT.APP_DOC_NUM , USERD.CUST_NAME AS CUST_NAME , USERD.SUBCUST_NAME AS SUBCUST_NAME FROM STOCTCCT TCCT LEFT OUTER JOIN STOCTVUR USERD ON (TCCT.GATE_CD = USERD.GATE_CD AND TCCT.USER_ID = USERD.USER_ID AND USERD.DEL_FLAG = '0') LEFT OUTER JOIN STOCTVUR USERC ON (TCCT.GATE_CD = USERC.GATE_CD AND TCCT.CONT_USER_ID = USERC.USER_ID AND USERC.DEL_FLAG = '0') WHERE TCCT.GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND TCCT.BUYER_CD = #{BUYER_CD} AND TCCT.DEL_FLAG = '0'
AND (TCCT.CONT_USER_ID = #{CONT_USER_ID} -- 계약담당자 OR EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM STOCSCTP SCTP WHERE TCCT.GATE_CD = SCTP.GATE_CD AND TCCT.APP_DOC_NUM = SCTP.APP_DOC_NUM AND TCCT.APP_DOC_CNT = SCTP.APP_DOC_CNT AND SCTP.DEL_FLAG = '0' AND SCTP.SIGN_USER_ID = #{CONT_USER_ID} --결재자 ) )
AND TCCT.CONT_DATE >= (#{CONT_DATE_START}) AND TCCT.CONT_DATE <= (#{CONT_DATE_END})
AND (TCCT.BUYER_CD LIKE '%' UPPER(#{BUYER_CD}) '%')
AND (UPPER(GETCUSTNAME(TCCT.GATE_CD, TCCT.BUYER_CD)) LIKE '%' UPPER(#{BUYER_NM}) '%')
AND (TCCT.DEPT_CD LIKE '%' UPPER(#{DEPT_CD}) '%')
AND (UPPER(GETDEPTNAME(TCCT.GATE_CD, TCCT.BUYER_CD, TCCT.DEPT_CD, #{ses.langCd})) LIKE '%' UPPER(#{DEPT_NM}) '%')
AND (TCCT.CONT_DESC LIKE '%' #{CONT_DESC} '%' OR TCCT.CONT_NUM LIKE '%' #{CONT_DESC} '%')
AND TCCT.USER_ID = #{USER_ID}
AND TCCT.CONT_USER_ID LIKE '%' UPPER(#{CONT_USER_ID}) '%'
AND UPPER(GETUSERNAME(TCCT.GATE_CD, TCCT.CONT_USER_ID, #{ses.langCd})) LIKE '%' UPPER(#{CONT_USER_NM}) '%'
AND TCCT.SIGN_STATUS IN ${SIGN_STATUS}
AND USERD.CUST_CODE = #{CUST_CODE}
AND USERD.CUST_NAME LIKE '%' #{CUST_NAME} '%'
AND USERD.SUBCUST_CODE = #{SUBCUST_CODE}
AND USERD.SUBCUST_NAME LIKE '%' #{SUBCUST_NAME} '%'
AND TCCT.PROGRESS_CD IN ${PROGRESS_CD}
AND TCCT.USER_NM LIKE '%'#{USER_NM}'%'
ORDER BY TCCT.CONT_NUM DESC , TCCT.CONT_CNT DESC , USERD.USER_NM

SELECT CUST.IRS_NUM AS CORP_NO ,(SELECT DEPT_CD FROM STOCCVUR WHERE GATE_CD = TCCT.GATE_CD AND USER_ID = TCCT.CONT_USER_ID) AS BRC ,(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDD') AS APLY_DT , TCCT.CONT_USER_ID AS USER_ID ,(CASE WHEN #{SMS_GUBUN} = 'REQ' THEN 'SMS_TC_REQ' ELSE 'SMS_PC_RJT' END) '@@' TCCT.GATE_CD '@@' TCCT.BUYER_CD '@@' TCCT.CONT_NUM '@@' TCCT.CONT_CNT '@@' TCCT.USER_ID AS CONT_TBL_PK , NULL AS FILE_SIZE FROM STOCTCCT TCCT JOIN STOCCUST CUST ON (CUST.GATE_CD = TCCT.GATE_CD AND CUST.CUST_CD = TCCT.BUYER_CD) WHERE TCCT.GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND TCCT.BUYER_CD = #{BUYER_CD} AND TCCT.CONT_NUM = #{CONT_NUM} AND TCCT.CONT_CNT = #{CONT_CNT} AND TCCT.USER_ID = #{USER_ID}

SELECT DISTINCT TVUR.SUBCUST_CODE ,TVUR.SUBCUST_NAME FROM STOCTVUR TVUR WHERE TVUR.GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND TVUR.DEL_FLAG = '0'
AND TVUR.CUST_NAME LIKE '%' #{CUST_NAME} '%'
AND TVUR.SUBCUST_NAME LIKE '%' #{SUBCUST_NAME} '%'
